questionHtml: Sketch the pH curve for the titration of 25.0 cm3 of ethylamine aqueous solution with 50.0 cm3 of butanoic acid aqueous solution of equal concentration. No calculations are required.
markschemeHtml:
decreasing pH curve ✔

pH close to 7 (6–8) at volume of 25 cm3 butanoic acid ✔

weak acid/base shape with no flat «strong acid/base» parts on the curve ✔

meta.title: Sketch the pH curve for the titration of 25.0 cm3 of ethylamine aqueous solution with 50.0 cm3 of butanoic acid aqueous solution of equal concentration. No calculations are require
